title: Timeline End date Automation

posts.author: keijzers (Jake K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I am trying to set up an automation to make my timeline update automatically. I have already set up a dependency column that pushes dates of item timelines if i manually adjust the end date of my item timeline

But, i would like to automate this. Unfortunately i cannot select push ‘timeline end date’ by ‘1 day’. Please see screenshot below. Is there an app or integration that can automate the timeline end date if the date passes?

image708×445 19.8 KB

posts.author: koko03_30 (Konstantin Botev)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Jake,

I think that the TImeline Manipulator app will be pretty helpful in your case. You can check here how it works:

auth.monday.com

Timeline manipulator - monday.com Marketplace

Automations trigger timeline updates when column values change.

Best of luck,
Konstantin
